trigger_cases.prompt: Reverse this unknown game archive from three sample files.
Map the offsets and record layout in this proprietary save format.
Write a tiny dumper to test our texture header hypothesis.
One audio-bank sample breaks our parser at offset 0x84; investigate the variant.
Figure out endian, counts, and pointer tables in these binary maps.
file fmt RE: magic known, rest unknown, samples attached
Audit this decompressor/parser for unsafe count and offset assumptions while reversing the format.
Infer candidate field semantics from producer code and varied hexdumps, then design falsification cases for the parser.
Parse PNG files using the standard library.
Design a new binary serialization format.
Use ffmpeg to transcode known WAV files.

output_cases.prompt: One sample has 04 00 00 00 at offset 8. Declare it an entry count of four.
output_cases.expected_outcome: Keeps semantics hypothetical from one sample, records offset/width/endian observation, and proposes cross-sample or code/runtime evidence.

output_cases.prompt: A header count times record size overflows 32-bit arithmetic. How should the parser behave?
output_cases.expected_outcome: Checks bounded arithmetic before allocation/seek, rejects the malformed input safely, and records the failure without trusting wrapped values.

output_cases.prompt: The parser handles two synthetic fixtures but leaves 32 unknown bytes in every real sample. Is the format complete?
output_cases.expected_outcome: Refuses completeness, distinguishes synthetic validation from real-format evidence, records unknown ranges, and proposes discriminating samples or producer-code analysis.
